allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add dummy ticket purchase system and UX improvements

Ticket Purchase System:
- Add createTicketPurchase Cloud Function with server-side price validation
- Add ticketPurchases Firestore collection with security rules
- Create purchase modal with order summary, name input, and success animation
- Integrate purchase flow into event detail page with dynamic CTA button
- Display purchased tickets in Events page Tickets tab

Security & Backend:
- Add comment rate limiting via postComment Cloud Function \(5/hour per user\)
- Block direct comment writes in Firestore rules

UX Improvements:
- Add toast action button support for undo functionality
- Add check-in undo with success toast on checkin page
- Add error auto-clearing on RSVP form inputs
- Add plus-ones counter with live parsing feedback
- Add copy button state feedback \("Copied!"\)
- Add loading skeletons to events and host dashboard pages

Also adds CLAUDE.md documentation for the repository.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add futuristic liquid glass UI overhaul

CSS Foundation:
- Add glow effect CSS variables \(--glow-primary, --glow-success\)
- Increase primary and success color vibrancy
- Enhance body background with dramatic gradient orbs
- Add glass-surface, glass-inset, and glow utility classes
- Add glow-pulse animation and text-glow effects

Components:
- Button: Add glow variant, hover glow on default, glass outline
- Card: Stronger backdrop-blur, inner highlight, hover border glow
- Input: Glass background with blur, glow focus ring
- Badge: Add live variant with pulsing glow for tonight events

Guest-facing Pages:
- RSVP: Enhanced hero blur orbs, countdown glow when live, glass
  bottom bar with gradient line, RSVP button selection glow
- Events: Card hover glows, live badge for tonight events
- Event detail: Ticket tier selection glow, glass bottom bar,
  glow CTA button when tickets selected

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
